title: Dangerous Drugs of Sex
overview: An elite salaryman drunkenly tries to die by suicide, but is saved by a mysterious stranger who holds him captive and sexually torments him.

trailers.title: 映画「性の劇薬」 2020年2月14日より順次公開（予告編）
The steamiest Japanese BL movie "Dangerous Drugs of Sex" challenges the definition of R-rated films.
